headline: FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE:FE) Misses Q1 2026 Earnings Estimates Despite Revenue Beat
summary: FirstEnergy Q1 2026 revenue beat estimates but EPS slightly missed at $0.72 vs $0.7351 forecast. Shares dipped 0.1% after-hours amid reaffirmed guidance and a $36B capital plan.

raw.headline: FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE:FE) Misses Q1 2026 Earnings Estimates Despite Revenue Beat
raw.summary: FirstEnergy Q1 2026 revenue beat estimates but EPS slightly missed at $0.72 vs $0.7351 forecast. Shares dipped 0.1% after-hours amid reaffirmed guidance and a $36B capital plan.

headline: FirstEnergy FE Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: On behalf of the FirstEnergy family, please accept our thoughts, prayers and love as you breathe the loss and celebrate the lives of your loved ones.  This morning, I'll provide an update on our second quarter and year-to-date performance and key developments that we believe are transforming FirstEnergy into a premier electric company.  Core earnings were $0.52 per share for the quarter compared to $0.51 in the second quarter of last year.

headline: FirstEnergy FE Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Brian Tierney: Thank you, Karen.  Thank you for joining us today and for your interest in FirstEnergy.  Core earnings were $0.83 per share for the quarter compared to $0.76 in the third quarter of 2024.

summary: Reports first quarter 2026 GAAP earnings of $0.70 per share and Core Earnings of $0.72 per share Invested nearly $1.4 billion in customer-focused capital, consistent with $6 billion in planned...

headline: FirstEnergy seeks to launch 3-year rate increase plan in 2027
summary: Akron-based utility is preparing to file request with state regulators to restructure consumer rates on May 22.
